channel.title: AlterCraft Blog
channel.description: Furniture, modular office, wardrobe, modular kitchen, interior and home automation guides from AlterCraft.

item.title: Modular Office Workstation Guide for Noida, Gurgaon and Meerut
item.description: Plan modular office workstations, staff desks, cabins, meeting tables, reception counters, storage and wire routing before fabrication.

item.title: Wardrobe Lighting and Ventilation Guide
item.description: Plan wardrobe lighting and ventilation with LED placement, sensor switches, air gaps, moisture control and fabrication-stage decisions.

item.title: Wardrobe Design for Sarees, Lehengas and Luggage
item.description: Plan an Indian wardrobe layout for sarees, lehengas, sherwanis, bags, shoes, bedding and luggage without wasting storage.

item.title: Modular Kitchen Storage Zones Guide
item.description: Plan modular kitchen storage by cooking, washing, pantry, drawer, corner, appliance and daily-use zones for Indian homes.

item.title: Modular Wardrobe Cost in Delhi NCR: What Changes the Price
item.description: Understand how size, shutter type, material, finish, drawers, lofts, hardware and installation affect modular wardrobe cost in Delhi NCR.

item.title: Sliding vs Openable Wardrobe for Small Bedrooms
item.description: Compare sliding wardrobes and openable wardrobes for small bedrooms by clearance, access, maintenance, cost factors and daily usability.

item.title: Wardrobe Internal Layout Guide: Hanging, Drawers, Shelves and Loft
item.description: Plan wardrobe internals with hanging space, drawers, shelves, loft storage, daily wear zones, accessories and clear access.

item.title: Small Bedroom Wardrobe Layout Tips: Avoid This Storage Mistake
item.description: Plan a small bedroom wardrobe layout with daily wear in the centre, drawers at waist height, hanging space, loft storage and fewer messy shelves.

item.title: Modular Kitchen Cost in Delhi NCR: What Changes the Budget
item.description: Understand modular kitchen cost in Delhi NCR, including layout, materials, finish, hardware, countertop, fittings and installation.

item.title: Laminate vs Acrylic vs Veneer: Which Finish Should You Choose?
item.description: Compare laminate, acrylic and veneer finishes for wardrobes, kitchens, TV units and custom furniture.

item.title: How to Plan a TV Unit Wall Before Fabrication
item.description: Plan a TV unit wall with cable routing, storage, panel depth, lighting, switch access and service space before fabrication.

item.title: Small Bedroom Storage Ideas That Still Feel Clean
item.description: Small bedroom storage ideas for beds, wardrobes, lofts, study corners and wall units that keep the room useful without making it feel crowded.

item.title: How to Install Soft-Close Hinges Without Ruining the Shutter
item.description: Choose the right soft-close cabinet hinge, mark carefully, drill safely and adjust the shutter cleanly.

item.title: Modular Wardrobe Design Guide for Indian Bedrooms
item.description: Plan a modular wardrobe with room measurements, standard dimensions, shutter choice, internal layout, materials, lighting, ventilation and cost tips for Indian bedrooms.

item.title: Interior Automation Ideas for Modern Homes
item.description: Smart interior automation ideas for lighting, curtains, wardrobes, kitchens and daily routines without making the home overcomplicated.

item.title: Furniture Blog and YouTube Content Roadmap
item.description: How furniture blogs, interior guides, project videos and YouTube tutorials can build trust, search visibility and brand value.
